title: Cymatics
description: 20,000 particles forming wave patterns. Mouse XY controls frequency.

title: Signal
description: Layered Lissajous waveforms. Mouse modulates frequency and amplitude.

title: Bayer Gradient
description: Animated gradient through Bayer 8x8 ordered dithering. Mouse controls center.

title: Ball Movers
description: Gaussian random-walk particles. Click spawns 100 new movers.

title: Noise Terrain
description: 3D Perlin noise terrain. Mouse Y = rotation, X = noise scale. Click cycles render mode.

title: Langtons Ant
description: Five ants with different rulesets competing for territory. Click to spawn.

title: DLA
description: Diffusion-limited aggregation. Slow crystalline growth. Click to place seeds.

title: Grid Distort
description: Dot grid warped by mouse proximity and noise drift.

title: Field Lines
description: Electric field lines between charges. Mouse is a moving charge. Click to place.

title: Wind Particles
description: Particles as velocity lines driven by wind. Click randomizes wind direction.

title: Neural Pulse
description: Connected nodes with traveling amber signal pulses. Click to fire.

title: Particles Repel
description: 3,000 particles repelled by mouse proximity. Bounce off edges.

title: Game of Life
description: Conway cellular automata. Cells age white to gray. Mouse draws cells.

title: Cascade
description: Text blocks falling with gravity. Mouse disrupts settled blocks.

title: Cellular Automaton
description: 1D Rule 90 automaton with varying dot sizes. Click to reset.

title: Contour
description: Animated topographic contour lines. Mouse creates hill. Click regenerates.

title: Physarum
description: 12,000 slime mold agents depositing pheromone trails. Mouse attracts.

title: Genetic Algorithm
description: Particles evolve spacing via DNA. Drag to draw obstacles.

title: Recursive Tree
description: Fractal branching tree. Mouse X = wind, Y = branch angle.

title: Ecosystem
description: Flocking organisms with energy. Hold mouse to create recharge zone.

title: Spirograph
description: Layered hypotrochoid curves. Mouse controls radius ratios. Click to regenerate.

title: Orbit
description: N-body gravitational system with orbital trails. Click-drag to launch new bodies.

title: Flowfield
description: 10,000 particles following Perlin noise vectors. Tap to randomize.

title: Boids
description: 1,500 flocking agents with separation, alignment, cohesion. Mouse repels.

title: Galaxy Close Up
description: Mass particles attracted to mouse with Gaussian drift. Click/drag spawns.

title: Solar System
description: 3D orbital system with black hole gravity. Mouse X = speed, Y = mass. WASD moves black hole. Space regenerates. Click spawns stars.
